## Safety warning

Do not post identity documents, phone numbers, addresses, private messages, child photos, medical records, wallet seed phrases, or private keys in this issue.

## Category

- [ ] Child/family hardship
- [ ] Homeless/vulnerable support
- [ ] Community emergency
- [ ] Education/basic tools
- [ ] OSS public-good support
- [ ] Other

Write a privacy-safe summary.

## Urgency

- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High

## Evidence handling

- [ ] Evidence can be public after redaction
- [ ] Evidence should be private review only
- [ ] Partner confirmation available
- [ ] Maintainer attestation needed

Describe support needed without exposing private data.
